channel.title: UK Public Affairs & Lobbying Jobs
channel.description: Job listings for UK Public Affairs roles, scraped by Pol-Intel.

item.title: Account Manager
item.description: Account Manager for Public Affairs and Government Relations team in London. Great opportunity for someone with strong interest in UK politics and public policy with previous similar experience. Act as day-to-day client contact, build trusted relationships, and work across sectors including financial services, energy, infrastructure and property.

item.title: Senior Account Executive / Consultant - Communications
item.description: Senior Account Executive or Consultant to join Communications Practice in London, focusing on Strategy and Corporate Communications in Financial Services. Support high-profile accounts with client roster spanning asset management, investment trusts, sustainable investment, wealth management, private markets and insurance.

item.title: Credit Controller
item.description: Experienced part-time Credit Controller for Finance team, working three days per week in London office. Oversee all aspects of credit control function, ensuring prompt payments and delivery of cashflow targets. Requires at least one year's credit control experience, strong organisational skills and ability to work independently.

item.title: Director - Public Affairs
item.description: Ambitious Director to join our Public Affairs and Government Relations team in London. Great opportunity for someone who thrives on shaping a strategic offering, winning new business, and delivering strategic counsel to clients.

item.title: Analyst (Strategy & Corporate Communications)
item.description: Entry-level position in our Communications practice in Farringdon, London. Ideal for someone kickstarting their career in communications and corporate affairs with broad exposure to all aspects of the Communications practice and comprehensive support to develop essential technical skills.
